title: elymus neplianus
intro: Elymus neplianus, also known as Nepalese wheat grass or Elymus nepalensis, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Elymus neplianus include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Elymus neplianus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve overall immune function. Elymus neplianus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
